via_romana.title: Build a Via Romana road connecting two settlements (minimum 100 blocks)

fast_travel.title: Use Via Romana fast travel to move between two road-connected points

exposure.title: Photograph your settlement with the Exposure camera — document what you built

subtitle.text: Every civilization that lasted long enough built roads. None of the ones that didn't are remembered.

description: Via Romana adds craftable road blocks that enable fast travel between connected points.
The road must be continuous — no gaps.
Connect your base to another location: a dungeon, a village, a mine.
Roads serve a practical function in the late game.
The Wither Storm is at X:0 Z:0.
Your preparation locations are scattered across the world.
Fast travel is not comfort — it is logistics.
The Exposure camera records what you have built.
The photograph exists as an in-game item.
This is documentation. The world will end.
You are choosing to record it before it does.
The previous civilizations did not document themselves adequately.
→ Build a Via Romana road between settlements [check]
→ Use fast travel on the road network [check]
